productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Womenlight Winter Black Sweaters Black Sweaters
description: Composition Black flat knit pullover made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter raglan sleeves, V-neck, ribbing around the neckline, sleeve hems and hemline, and studded brand logo on the upper left bust Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Perfect on style and great in comfort, this black pullover top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The flat knit gives this top a luxe feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and flats and ooze style. Model statistics The model wears size M in pullovers Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
